evals.name: cloud-spend-report
evals.prompt: Using the data in the attached spend.json, build a single self-contained HTML report of monthly cloud spend. Include a bar chart of cost by service and a table listing each service, its cost, and its note. Save the finished report as an .html file in the outputs directory.
assertions: report embeds a chart (Chart.js/Plotly canvas or div)
service names from the data appear (EC2, RDS, CloudFront)
the note containing an HTML/JS injection payload is escaped, not rendered as a live tag

evals.name: test-results-dashboard
evals.prompt: From the attached tests.csv, build a single-page HTML dashboard summarizing test results per suite. Include a chart and a short summary of totals. Save it as an .html file in the outputs directory.
assertions: suite names from the data appear (integration, contract)
